title: README demo of the cycle
goal: Add a real terminal demo of the mini workflow cycle to README: a committed, reproducible recording script (a scripted non-interactive walkthrough recorded with asciinema and converted to a GIF via agg, no live Claude API) plus the generated GIF embedded near the Quick start section, with a static annotated fallback block for renderers that don't load the image.

steps.title: Scripted cycle walkthrough
steps.detail: demo/cycle.sh — non-interactive bash that prints the mini cycle (next/plan/do/done) as annotated $ commands plus real safe output (mini status / mini todo / --help), no live Claude API; runs end-to-end in a temp dir.

steps.title: Recording script
steps.detail: demo/record.sh — wraps cycle.sh with asciinema rec --command into a .cast, then agg into demo/cycle.gif; puts ~/.cargo/bin on PATH, documents prerequisites, idempotent.

steps.title: Generate and commit the GIF
steps.detail: Run record.sh to produce a valid non-empty demo/cycle.gif; keep the intermediate .cast out of git.

steps.title: Embed demo in README
steps.detail: Add the GIF after Quick start via an absolute raw.githubusercontent URL (renders on GitHub and npm) with a static annotated fallback transcript and a link to demo/.

steps.title: Wrap up and checks
steps.detail: Tick mini todo done 13, gitignore the .cast artifact, npm run typecheck and npm test stay green.

autoCommit.subject: Phase 114: README demo of the cycle
